name: sphinx-rtd-size

metadata.name: sphinx-rtd-size
metadata.summary: Sphinx extension for resizing your RTD theme.

documentation:
# sphinx-rtd-size
Sphinx extension for resizing your RTD theme

## Usage

Install the package:

`pip install sphinx-rtd-size`

And in your `conf.py`:
```
    extensions = [
        ...
        'sphinx_rtd_size',
    ]
    
    sphinx_rtd_size_width = "90%"
```

functions.name: sphinx_rtd_size.extension.add_html_static
documentation:
Add the given path as static html/resource to the sphinx app.

```
param app

The sphinx app to add to.

param static_path

The path to add.
```

functions.name: sphinx_rtd_size.extension.add_config_value
documentation:
Declare a configuration value for this extension,
And make it available for any templates.

```
param app

The sphinx app to declare to.

param name

The name of the configuration.

param default

The default value of the configuration.

param rebuild

Whether to rebuild the site when this configuration changes.

param types

The expected type of the configuration.
```

functions.name: sphinx_rtd_size.extension.setup
documentation:
Resize the RTD theme by given configuration.

```
param app

The sphinx app to resize.

return
```
